debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args)

failed_attempts:

  have h₁ : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := h
  have h₂ : assert_bits args := by

      (try omega) <;>
      (try

          simp [ZMod.nat_cast_self]

      <;>
      (try

          simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self]
          <;>
          (try omega) <;>
          (try decide) <;>
          (try norm_num)
        })
  have h₃ : e = bits2num args := by
    have h₄ : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := h₁
    have h₅ : e.eval = bits2num args := by
      sorry
    have h₆ : e = bits2num args := by
      sorry
    exact h₆
  exact ⟨h₂, h₃⟩
  <;>
  simp_all
  <;>
  (try omega) <;>
  (try decide) <;>
  (try norm_num)
